case_title: KLEINFELD, MYLES PAUL DBA THE INTERNET GROUP VS PAUL, LISA OFFICER OF INTELLIGENT DESIGN INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KLEINFELD, MYLES PAUL DBA THE INTERNET GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT PAUL, LISA OFFICER OF INTELLIGENT DESIGN INC. INTELLIGENT DESIGN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLEINFELD, MYLES PAUL DBA THE INTERNET GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAUL, LISA OFFICER OF INTELLIGENT DESIGN INC. INTELLIGENT DESIGN INC. $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,426.00, DEFENDANT LISA PAUL AS AN INDIVIDUAL IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
